title: Creating a Student Avatar
scenario: Design a simple persona for a high school student. The persona should include the student's age, academic interests, and favorite subjects. Use a formal tone and include the student's name and age.
constraints: Must include the student's name and age

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the description includes the student's name and age, and uses a formal tone.
Check if the description includes the required information (academic interests, favorite subjects).
Check if the description is clear and easy to understand.
